result.stderr:
mgfxc - The MonoGame Effect compiler.

Missing argument 'OutputFile'

Usage: mgfxc <SourceFile>  <OutputFile> 

Options:
    /Profile:value 	 - Must be one of the following: DirectX_11, OpenGL, OpenGLES
    /Debug 		 - Include extra debug information in the compiled effect.
    /Defines:value 	 - Semicolon-delimited define assignments
    /UseMojoShader
